text:
Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
OBESITY_MEDICAID_EVER Obesity - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
OBESITY_MEDICARE_EVER Obesity -Medicare Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
OTHDEL_COMBINED Other Developmental Delays - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
OTHDEL_MEDICAID Other Developmental Delays - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not
